allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
✨ Add MCP server configuration for PostgreSQL database access

This commit adds Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configuration to enable
Claude Code to directly interact with the PostgreSQL klima database.

## Features:
- PostgreSQL MCP server configuration
- Direct database query capability for Claude Code
- Schema exploration and data analysis tools
- PostGIS spatial query support

## Files Added:
- .claude/mcp.json.example - Template configuration (safe to commit)
- .claude/README.md - Setup instructions and documentation

## Security:
- .claude/mcp.json (with credentials) excluded from git
- Updated .gitignore to protect sensitive configuration files

## What this enables:
- ✅ Claude can explore database schema
- ✅ Run SQL queries and analyze results  
- ✅ Debug and optimize PostGIS spatial queries
- ✅ Provide context-aware database suggestions
- ✅ Analyze climate data patterns

## Setup Instructions:
1. Copy .claude/mcp.json.example to .claude/mcp.json
2. Edit mcp.json and set your PostgreSQL password
3. Restart Claude Code/VSCode
4. MCP server will automatically connect to the database

## Documentation:
See .claude/README.md for detailed setup and usage instructions.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
https://claude.com/claude-code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
